alkylation reagent: alkylation using dithiothreitol solution (DTT, final concentration 20 mM) and iodoacetamide solution (IAA, final concentration 50 mM)
alkylation concentration: alkylation using dithiothreitol solution (DTT, final concentration 20 mM) and iodoacetamide solution (IAA, final concentration 50 mM)
cleavage agent: the protein was digested by the Lys-C Protease (PierceTM, MS grade, 90051, ThermoFisher) in a ratio of 1:50 (w/w)
collision energy: the data-dependent MS/MS scan was performed by the higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD) methods with a 38 normalized collision energy value (NCE)
fragmentation method: the data-dependent MS/MS scan was performed by the higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD) methods
instrument: the analysis was carried out on an Easy-nLCTM 1200 System (LC140, Thermo Scientific) in tandem with an Orbitrap FusionTM TribridTM Mass Spectrometry
labeling: the TMT10plex Isobaric Mass Tag Labelling Reagents (Cat# 90113) were obtained from Thermo Fisher Scientific
reduction reagent: alkylation using dithiothreitol solution (DTT, final concentration 20 mM)
reduction concentration: alkylation using dithiothreitol solution (DTT, final concentration 20 mM)
